global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with engaging text and shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting a streaming service with new hits every week.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text at the top reads 'Stream the hype', standing out against the purple background.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline states 'New hits every week', providing additional context.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape in the center, possibly an oval or rectangle, adds visual interest.

elements.label: Additional decorative shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape, similar to the previous one, enhances the design's complexity.

elements.label: Central decorative element
elements.description: A prominent rectangular shape in the center, contributing to the overall layout.

elements.label: Small circular shapes
elements.description: Two small circular shapes positioned centrally, adding a playful touch to the design.

elements.label: Another central shape
elements.description: A large rectangular shape that is slightly off-center, providing balance to the composition.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: A small circular element that complements the other shapes in the design.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape positioned centrally, contributing to the overall layout.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button at the bottom reads 'Install now', encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Additional text element
elements.description: A small text element at the bottom, possibly indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'BingeLayer' is displayed at the top left, establishing brand identity.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label at the top right indicating 'UGC', suggesting user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, playful and modern, streaming service promotion
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, with the CTA button at the bottom.
